items.title_en: Cuba’s blackouts leave high-rise residents with constant uncertainty

items.title_en: Oscar-winning Star Wars editor Marcia Lucas dies aged 80
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡获奖《星球大战》剪辑师玛西娅·卢卡斯去世，享年 80 岁
items.desc_en: The film editor and ex-wife of director George Lucas was widely recognised as a pivotal creative force behind the original space trilogy.
items.desc_zh: 电影剪辑师兼导演乔治·卢卡斯的前妻被广泛认为是原始太空三部曲背后的关键创作力量。

items.title_en: Trump considers dropping Freedom 250 concerts in D.C. after artists pull out
items.title_zh: 艺术家退出后，特朗普考虑取消在华盛顿举行的 Freedom 250 音乐会
items.desc_en: In a post on Truth Social on ‌Saturday, the president suggested the concert series may no longer ‌be necessary if performers continue to back out.
items.desc_zh: 在周六《Truth Social》上的一篇帖子中，总统表示，如果表演者继续退出，该系列音乐会可能不再有必要。

items.title_en: Trump attacks artists dropping out of US Freedom 250 concert and mulls appearing himself
items.title_zh: 特朗普攻击退出美国自由 250 音乐会的艺术家并考虑亲自出席
items.desc_en: Performers Young MC, Poison frontman Bret Michaels and country singer Martina McBride raised concerns the event will be political.
items.desc_zh: 表演者 Young MC、Poison 主唱 Bret Michaels 和乡村歌手 Martina McBride 担心该活动将具有政治性。

items.title_en: DOJ seeks Judge Eleanor Ross recusal in Georgia election case, citing reports she was disciplined
items.title_zh: 司法部寻求埃莉诺·罗斯法官回避佐治亚州选举案，理由是有报道称她受到纪律处分
items.desc_en: The DOJ is suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensberger over his refusal to give the department election records.
items.desc_zh: 美国司法部正在起诉佐治亚州国务卿布拉德·拉芬斯伯格拒绝提供该部门的选举记录。

items.title_en: 'No-one feels safe now': Residents of Romanian city hit by drone share fears

items.desc_zh: 人们刚刚开始返回周五凌晨遭受袭击的街区查看自己的房屋。

items.title_en: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
items.title_zh: 慈善机构警告说，埃博拉在刚果民主共和国的传播“令人震惊”，世界卫生组织主席访问了受灾最严重的地区
items.desc_en: Médicins Sans Frontières says that never before has an Ebola outbreak recorded so many cases so soon after its declaration.
items.desc_zh: 无国界医生组织表示，埃博拉疫情爆发后从未出现过如此之快的病例记录。

items.desc_zh: 地方当局表示，其他西方音乐会的取消也是这一决定的原因之一。

items.title_en: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade

items.title_en: At least 3.5 million people have lost food stamp access as Trump's 'big beautiful bill' cuts take effect, analysis finds
items.title_zh: 分析发现，随着特朗普的“美丽大法案”削减生效，至少 350 万人失去了食品券
items.desc_en: Even as Americans confront higher costs, millions of people have lost Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program food benefits.
items.desc_zh: 尽管美国人面临更高的成本，但仍有数百万人失去了补充营养援助计划的食品福利。

items.title_en: Travelers to Europe may be leaving money on the table. Here's why
items.title_zh: 前往欧洲的游客可能会留下金钱。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: Travelers to Europe who buy certain merchandise can claim a refund of the value-added taxes they pay.
items.desc_zh: 前往欧洲购买某些商品的游客可以要求退还所缴纳的增值税。

items.title_en: Stocks including Nvidia and Apple are top picks as market run-up continues, Bank of America says
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，随着市场持续上涨，英伟达和苹果等股票成为首选
items.desc_en: Bank of America named some of its favorite stocks to buy in June.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行列出了六月份最喜欢购买的一些股票。

items.title_zh: 美光科技是本周反弹至新高后最超买的股票之一

items.desc_zh: 本周，投资者纷纷买入美光科技和戴尔科技等股票。

items.title_en: Oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz might not return to levels seen before the Iran war
items.title_zh: 通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油出口可能不会恢复到伊朗战争前的水平
items.desc_en: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane, raising questions about the future.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁严重挑战了海上航道的航行自由，引发了对未来的疑问。

items.title_en: Josh Brown, counting on a new momentum strategy, thinks investors want more than index funds
items.title_zh: 乔什·布朗（Josh Brown）指望新的动量策略，认为投资者想要的不仅仅是指数基金
items.desc_en: Brown debuted a separately managed account named after a premium cut of steak — built to hold what he considers the market's best opportunities.
items.desc_zh: 布朗推出了一个单独管理的账户，该账户以一块优质牛排命名，旨在保存他认为市场上最好的机会。

items.title_en: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
items.title_zh: 美国、英国和澳大利亚开发水下无人机技术
items.desc_en: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.
items.desc_zh: 该技术是根据奥库斯军事协议开发的，旨在保护海底电缆并增强海军防御。

items.title_en: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality
items.title_zh: 分析：伊朗战争的结束可能只是美国不平等新时代的开始
items.desc_en: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices.
items.desc_zh: 股市上涨，而消费者却付出了高能源价格的代价。

items.title_en: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
items.title_zh: Meta 在销售广告以外的其他产品方面一直举步维艰。人工智能会有所不同吗？
items.desc_en: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed.
items.desc_zh: Meta 正在大力推动其业务扩展到在线广告之外，但过去的努力表明，成功还远未得到保证。

items.title_en: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?
items.title_zh: Z 世代会成为复兴电影的一代吗？
items.desc_en: Gen Zers like affordable, social experiences and are driving demand for anime and video game titles at the theaters.
items.desc_zh: Z 世代喜欢经济实惠的社交体验，并推动了影院对动漫和视频游戏的需求。

items.title_en: US not 'turning back' on Asia allies, but expects them to boost defence - Hegseth
items.title_zh: 美国不会“拒绝”亚洲盟友，但希望他们加强防御 - 赫格斯

items.desc_zh: 对同事和亲属的腐败调查使西班牙总理陷入了生存之战。

items.title_en: Ghana parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
items.title_zh: 加纳议会通过反 LGBTQ+ 法案
items.desc_en: Same-sex acts are punishable by jail terms under Ghana's new bill targeting those identifying as gay, lesbian or transgender.
items.desc_zh: 根据加纳针对男同性恋、女同性恋或跨性别者的新法案，同性性行为可被判处监禁。

items.title_en: Trump holds meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普召开会议就伊朗协议做出“最终决定”
items.desc_en: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.
items.desc_zh: 在官员确认美国和伊朗已就协议框架达成一致后，美国总统会见了他的顾问。

items.title_en: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title_en: Former US attorney general Pam Bondi testifies in congressional Epstein probe
items.title_zh: 美国前司法部长帕姆·邦迪在国会爱泼斯坦调查中作证
items.desc_en: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 该证词是在美国最高检察官被美国总统唐纳德·特朗普罢免一个月后发表的。

items.title_en: CNBC's Official Global Soccer Team Valuations 2026: Here's how the top 30 clubs in the world stack up
items.title_zh: CNBC 2026 年全球足球队官方估值：以下是世界排名前 30 的俱乐部的排名
items.desc_en: The world's 30 most valuable soccer teams are worth an average of $2.66 billion, according to CNBC's official team valuations.
items.desc_zh: 根据 CNBC 官方球队估值，全球 30 支最有价值的足球队平均身价为 26.6 亿美元。

items.title_zh: Step 3.7 Flash

items.desc_zh: 可以看到并采取行动的闪电速度代理模型

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.desc_zh: 利用 AI 即时设计家居

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_en: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
items.title_zh: Meta 多次因 Facebook 和 Instagram 用户禁令而冷落欧盟机构
items.desc_en: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_en: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控利用内部数据赚取 120 万美元赌注
items.desc_en: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.
items.desc_zh: 这名谷歌长期员工因涉嫌违反内幕交易法而在纽约受到指控。

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。
